chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6173 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 28424/2024 2. For orders on CMA No. 27376/2024 3. For hearing of main case 23.12.2024 Mr. Arshad Hussain Shehzad, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General 1. Granted. 2-3. Per petitioner’s counsel this matter pertains to imposition of Capital Value Tax vide Section 8 of the Finance Act, 2022. Learned counsel states that this matter has already been determined by the Division Bench of this Court in the case of Irfan Hussain Halai through his duly constituted attorney and 20 others vs. Federation of Pakistan through Secretary Revenue Division Ministry of Finance and 3 others reported as PLD 2024 Sindh 453. Learned counsel states that the petition may be dismissed in the terms of the aforesaid judgment. Learned Assistant Attorney General is present waives notice and has no cavil to the aforesaid. The instant petition is dismissed as aforesaid. Judge Judge Amjad
